name: Finance Report
query:
select Date(posting_date) as 'Date', 
ROUND( (sum(round(net_total*0.7, 0)) - (sum(round(net_total*0.7, 0))  * 7/107) ), 2) as 'Total',
ROUND( (sum(round(net_total*0.7, 0))  * 7/107), 2) as 'Vat',  
ROUND( sum( round(net_total*0.7, 0) ), 2) 'Net Total'
from `tabSales Invoice` SI
join `tabCustomer` C on C.name = SI.customer
where Date(posting_date) between %(from_date)s and %(to_date)s
and customer = 'ลูกค้าทั่วไป'
and SI.docstatus <> 2
and C.customer_type = 'Individual'
group by Date(posting_date)
order by Date(posting_date);
